calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-05-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Alexander Rosan, a/k/a Alexander G. Rosan.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Michael Shintaku, CSR #8251. Telephone: 408-410-8040. Email: emailformike@hotmail.com.

Roger E. Jackson, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff National Collegiate Student Loan Trust 2007-4, a Delaware Statutory Trust.
No appearance by defendant Alexander Rosan, a/k/a Alexander G. Rosan.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on August 20, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Alexander Rosan, a/k/a Alexander G. Rosan, occurred on September 18, 2018 and was effectuated on September 28, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant Alexander Rosan, a/k/a Alexander G. Rosan, on March 1, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 1, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on January 7, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff National Collegiate Student Loan Trust 2007-4, a Delaware Statutory Trust, and against the defaulted defendant Alexander Rosan, a/k/a Alexander G. Rosan, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $51,339.42.
Costs - $779.10.

Total - $52,118.52.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
